name: Qualified Lessee Construction Allowance Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to retail tenants (selling goods or services to the public) with a lease of 15 years or less where the improvements revert to the lessor.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes from a lessee's gross income any cash or rent reductions received from a lessor for constructing or improving qualified long-term real property in a retail space.
